title: onosma gigantea var. gigantea
intro: Onosma gigantea var. gigantea, also known as Giant Onosma or Giant Goldenseal, is a plant species in the family Apocynaceae, characterized by its large, golden-yellow flowers and hairy leaves. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Onosma gigantea var. gigantea include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory symptoms, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Onosma gigantea var. gigantea include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
